pokemon:komala.name: Komala
pokemon:komala.summary: The log it holds was given to it by its parents at birth. It has also been known to cling to the arm of a friendly Trainer.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The log it holds was given to it by its parents at birth. It has also been known to cling to the arm of a friendly Trainer.
It is born asleep, and it dies asleep. All its movements are apparently no more than the results of it tossing and turning in its dreams.
It remains asleep from birth to death as a result of the sedative properties of the leaves that form its diet.
It stays asleep from the moment it’s born. When it falls into a deep sleep, it stops moving altogether.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The log it holds was given to it by its parents at birth. It has also been known to cling to the arm of a friendly Trainer.
